valid: For the period 18:00 (UTC) on Sun 21 Jun 2026 to 18:00 (UTC) on Mon 22 Jun 2026
general_synopsis: High Forties 1029 slow-moving intensifying 1031 by midday tomorrow. New low expected Biscay 1017 by same time. Low 400 miles west of FitzRoy 1013 moving steadily east losing its identity
